v0.2.4.description:
This updates the mod to be compatible with the newly released version 1.8 of Prodigal. Game content new to 1.8, including new items and new dungeons, have not yet been added to the randomizer.

This release is not compatible with saves from earlier versions, however if you create a new save and connect to an existing multiworld you should receive all your items again.

Additional fixes:
- Fix `start_inventory` and `start_inventory_from_pool`
- Option `start_with_winged_boots` now adds winged boots to inventory in addition to equipping them
- Items with progression useful classification are now colored yellow
